message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching mission (#1065)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-5389-atlantis-runs-plans-on-prs-even-when-no-files-matching-when-modifi",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching when_modified patterns have changed",
+    "description": "Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching when_modified patterns have changed. This issue affects 23+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching…",
+        "description": "Modified `server/events/plan_command_runner.go` to clear pending status even when silence flags are enabled:\n```yaml\nrepos:\n- id: github.com/xxxx/monorepo\n  apply_requirements: [mergeable]\n  allowed_overrides: [workflow]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Modified `server/events/plan_command_runner.go` to clear pending status even when silence flags are enabled:",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "repos:\n- id: github.com/xxxx/monorepo\n  apply_requirements: [mergeable]\n  allowed_overrides: [workflow]",
+        "ATLANTIS_SILENCE_VCS_STATUS_NO_PLANS = true\nATLANTIS_SILENCE_VCS_STATUS_NO_PROJECTS = true\nATLANTIS_SILENCE_NO_PROJECTS = true\nATLANTIS_HIDE_PREV_PLAN_COMMENTS = true\nATLANTIS_HIDE_UNCHANGED_PLAN_COMMENTS = true",
+        "version: 3\nprojects:\n- name: 6-app-test-sandbox\n  dir: infrastructure-gcp/6-app-test/environments/sandbox\n  autoplan:\n    when_modified:\n    - '*.tf'\n    - ../../modules/**/*.tf\n    - ../../6-app-modules/**/*.tf\n    - '**/*.tfvars'\n    - ../../config/**/*.yaml\n    - ../../modules/**/*.yaml\n  workspace: default\n  workflow: default\n  terraform_version: v1.6.3"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/5389",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/5713"
+    },
+    "reactions": 23,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-14T06:27:51.497Z",
